ddls:
CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "build_failed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the build failed (1 for failed, 0 for succeeded) */,
  "is_pr" INTEGER /* Indicates if the build is for a pull request (1 for PR, 0 for regular build) */,
  "prev_commit_resolution_status" INTEGER /* Resolution status of the previous commit (1 for resolved, 0 for unresolved) */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Size of the team working on the build */,
  "num_commit_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the commit associated with the build */,
  "src_churn" INTEGER /* Number of source code lines changed */,
  "test_churn" INTEGER /* Number of test code lines changed */,
  "files_added" INTEGER /* Number of files added in the build */,
  "files_deleted" INTEGER /* Number of files deleted in the build */,
  "files_modified" INTEGER /* Number of files modified in the build */,
  "tests_added" INTEGER /* Number of test cases added in the build */,
  "tests_deleted" INTEGER /* Number of test cases deleted in the build */,
  "src_files" INTEGER /* Number of source code files affected in the build */,
  "doc_files" INTEGER /* Number of documentation files affected in the build */,
  "other_files" INTEGER /* Number of other files affected in the build */,
  "sloc" INTEGER /* Size of the source code in lines of code (SLOC) */,
  "test_lines_per_kloc" REAL /* Number of test lines per thousand lines of code */,
  "test_cases_per_kloc" REAL /* Number of test cases per thousand lines of code */,
  "asserts_cases_per_kloc" REAL /* Number of assert cases per thousand lines of code */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the build started */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository where the build is performed */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team working on the build */,
  "build_duration" REAL /* Duration of the build process in seconds */,
  "build_trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of trigger that initiated the build */,
  "build_artifact_url" TEXT /* URL to the build artifact */,
  "build_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the build was performed */,
  "build_config" TEXT /* Configuration settings used for the build */,
  "build_agent" TEXT /* Name or ID of the build agent that executed the build */,
  "build_node" TEXT /* Name or ID of the build node where the build was executed */,
  "build_log_url" TEXT /* URL to the build log file */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Current status of the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "repo_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the repository */,
  "repo_type" TEXT /* Type of repository */,
  "repo_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository */,
  "repo_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was created */,
  "repo_last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the team is working on */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Size of the team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's responsibilities */,
  "team_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "team_last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the commit belongs to */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "commit_author" TEXT /* Author of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date and time the commit was made */,
  "commit_author_email" TEXT /* Email of the commit author */,
  "commit_author_date" TEXT /* Date and time the commit was authored */,
  "commit_committer" TEXT /* Name of the commit committer */,
  "commit_committer_email" TEXT /* Email of the commit committer */,
  "commit_committer_date" TEXT /* Date and time the commit was committed */,
  "commit_message_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the commit message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_commits" (
  "build_commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build-commit relationship */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "commit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commit was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_commits_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_commits_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "user_last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_users" (
  "build_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build-user relationship */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the build (e.g., committer, reviewer) */,
  "user_activity" TEXT /* Activity of the user in the build (e.g., reviewed code, wrote tests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_users_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., passed, failed, skipped) */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_result_message" TEXT /* Message or error log from the test */,
  "test_result_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was recorded */,
  "test_result_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "test_case_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "test_case_file" TEXT /* File path to the test case */,
  "test_case_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case */,
  "test_case_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "test_case_last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was last updated */,
  "test_case_author" TEXT /* Author of the test case */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_metrics_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)
